event: Sprint 1 begun: Implement the New Bark Town starting area cluster

Accuracy review: ACCEPT WITH NOTES. Fix 1: post-starter scene must advance to SCENE_ELMSLAB_AIDE_GIVES_POTION (scene 5) not SCENE_ELMSLAB_NOOP. Fix 2: MeetMom uses ClearEvent not SetEvent for EVENT_PLAYERS_HOUSE_MOM_2. Coords/warps/NPCs all verified accurate.
Parallel implementation phase launched: Merry, Pippin, Sam working simultaneously.
All 3 parallel implementations completed: 35/35 tests passing, identical module structures. Code lost — worktrees cleaned up before commits.
Worktree code loss incident. Pivoting: Bilbo implementing directly on main branch using all plan docs + hobbit summaries as input.
Implementation complete: 8 modules, 35 tests, 3700 lines. Committed as f86e79f and pushed to main.
Sprint 1 COMPLETE. Moved from progress.jsonl to done.jsonl. Fellowship disbanded. Sprint 2 starting next.
Sprint 1 closed. Full pipeline: Architecture -> Frodo plan -> Bilbo review -> Gimli accuracy check -> Bilbo final impl. Outcome: 8 modules, 35 tests, 3700 lines, commit f86e79f.
